extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked on the steep Trevi finish, held off YATES Adam's late surge by 3 seconds to win while THOMAS Geraint took GC on countback.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked before the steepest 500m finale, forcing chasers to bridge rather than contest from position
MOSCON Gianni tracked VAN AVERMAET Greg's move but faded, suggesting Sky prioritized THOMAS over stage hunting
YATES Adam waited for MOSCON's counter before attacking, losing 3 seconds by not bridging directly to ROGLIČ
THOMAS took GC via fourth-place countback over VAN AVERMAET despite identical time, proving stage positioning matters beyond bonuses

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: sustained power over 500m steep finale after early attack signals exceptional anaerobic capacity on wall finishes
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: closed massive gap solo after waiting tactically, but conservative timing cost stage win by 3 seconds
rider_signals.BEVIN Patrick: negative: crashed in leader's jersey with 30km remaining, highlighting vulnerability leading long transition stages
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: caught in mid-stage crash, finished with lead group already over line, eliminating GC contention
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: secured GC via countback despite missing bonus seconds, showing consistent positioning over explosive moves
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: third place six days after Strade Bianche win demonstrates recovery and form trajectory continuing
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: neutral: covered VAN AVERMAET but faded to allow YATES and THOMAS past, possible team tactics for THOMAS GC
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: initiated late selection but countered immediately, losing GC to THOMAS on countback despite same time
